1.description: get Finnmark county geometry and fylkesnummer

2.description: get all municipalities with geometry and identifiers

4.description: get buildings with point geometry and identifiers

5.description: reduce 200-year flood polygons to Finnmark county extent

6.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced 200-year flood polygons

7.description: assign each flooded building to a municipality

9.description: sort municipalities by flooded-building count descending
